title: Present Levels Drafter
description: Turn raw notes into a neutral PLAAFP-style summary paragraph.
template: Using the notes below, draft one neutral PLAAFP-style paragraph for {area}. Teacher observations: {teacherObservations}. Assessment data summary: {assessmentDataSummary}. State strengths, needs, and impact on access to the general curriculum, and do not infer anything that is not explicitly stated in the input. Never use a real student's name — write [Student] instead. This is a draft that requires review and approval by the full IEP team; do not make eligibility, placement, or disciplinary determinations.

fields.label: Teacher observations
fields.placeholder: Paste observation notes (no student names or identifying details).

fields.label: Assessment data summary
fields.placeholder: Summarize assessment data (no student names or identifying details).
